### EDA

```{r}
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
```

```{r}
#| message: false
data <- read_csv(here("data", "cleaned_data.csv"))
data <- data %>%
  select(year, Player, Age, GS, Wins, Completions, Attempts, Comp_Percentage)

head(data, 10)
```

## Exploratory Data Analysis

```{r}
#2015–2024 
historical_qbs <- data %>%
  filter(year >= 2015, year <= 2024)

#2025 
qbs_2025 <- data %>%
  filter(year == 2025)

historical_qbs <- historical_qbs %>%
  mutate(comp_rate = Comp_Percentage / 100)
```

```{r}
ggplot(historical_qbs, aes(x = comp_rate)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 21, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of QB Completion Rates (2015–2024)",
    x = "Completion Rate",
    y = "Number of QB Seasons"
  )
```

```{r}
historical_qbs %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = comp_rate)) +
  geom_density(fill = "lightblue", alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(
    title = "Density of QB Completion Rates",
    x = "Completion Rate",
    y = "Density"
  )
```

```{r}
historical_qbs %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Attempts, y = comp_rate)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(
    title = "Completion Rate vs Pass Attempts",
    x = "Attempts",
    y = "Completion Rate"
  )
```

```{r}
historical_qbs %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(year), y = comp_rate)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(
    title = "Completion Rate by Season",
    x = "Season",
    y = "Completion Rate"
  )
```

```{r}
data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Age)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 15, fill = "skyblue", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of QB Ages",
    x = "Age",
    y = "Number of QB Seasons"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
data %>%
  mutate(comp_rate = Completions / Attempts) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Age, y = comp_rate)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, color = "red") +
  labs(
    title = "Completion Rate vs Age",
    x = "Age",
    y = "Completion Rate"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Posterior

```{r}
m <- mean(historical_qbs$comp_rate)
v <- var(historical_qbs$comp_rate)

m 
v

alpha_prior <- m * ((m * (1 - m) / v) - 1)
beta_prior  <- (1 - m) * ((m * (1 - m) / v) - 1)

alpha_prior
beta_prior

qb_posteriors <- data %>%
  mutate(
    alpha_post = alpha_prior + Completions,
    beta_post  = beta_prior + (Attempts - Completions)
  )
```

```{r}
posterior_2025 <- qbs_2025 %>%
  mutate(
    alpha_post = alpha_prior + Completions,
    beta_post  = beta_prior + (Attempts - Completions),
    post_mean  = alpha_post / (alpha_post + beta_post),
    lower_95   = qbeta(0.025, alpha_post, beta_post),
    upper_95   = qbeta(0.975, alpha_post, beta_post)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(post_mean))

posterior_2025
```

```{r}
posterior_2025 %>%
  mutate(
    raw_rate = Completions / Attempts,
    shrinkage = post_mean - raw_rate
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Age, y = shrinkage)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "Bayesian Shrinkage vs Age",
    x = "Age",
    y = "Posterior Adjustment"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
posterior_2025 %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Age, y = post_mean)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, color = "blue") +
  labs(
    title = "Estimated QB Accuracy vs Age",
    x = "Age",
    y = "Posterior Mean Completion Probability"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
